sections.paragraph:
ἀρχιποίμην, ενος, ὁ (s. ποιμήν; Herodian Gr. I 16, 19; wooden tablet of imperial times in Dssm., LO 77f [LAE 97ff]=Sb 3507, 2; 8087, 7; PLips 97 XI, 4 Καμήτι ἀρχιποιμένι; PSI 286, 6; 4 Km 3:4 Sym.; TestJud 8:1: cited in WJost, ΠΟΙΜΗΝ, diss. Giessen, ’39, 47–50) chief shepherd of Christ 1 Pt 5:4 (cp. the ποιμὴν μέγας Hb 13:20 and the ἀρχιβουκόλος of the Dionysus mysteries; RPerdelwitz, D. Mysterienrel. u. d. Problem d. 1 Pt 1911, 100f).—M-M. TW. Spicq.

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

Dssm. Dssm. = ADeissmann, various works—List 6

LO LO = Licht vom Osten—s. Dssm., LO in List 6

LAE LAE , s. Dssm. LO—List 6

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

PLips PLips = Griech. Urkunden der Papyrussammlung zu Leipzig—List 4

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

diss. diss. = dissertation

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Spicq Spicq = CS., Lexique théologique du Nouveau Testament—Lists 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 139
